hooks.command: node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||j.tool_response?.filePath||'';if(f)process.stdout.write(f);});" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && pnpm biome format --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
